基奧特：我拒絕車路士而選擇阿仙奴

基奧特擔心迪馬堤奧不會重視自己，所以拒絕了車路士……
阿仙奴新兵基奧特透露，在與兵工廠簽約前，他有機會加盟新科歐洲冠軍車路士。

25歲的基奧特是去季法甲冠軍兼神射手，因此獲得了許多大球會的垂青。不過最終他選擇了7年無冠的阿仙奴，轉會已經正式落實，外界預計轉會費將達到1500萬歐元。

基奧特透露自己放棄了加盟車路士的機會，因為他更認可阿仙奴的足球哲學：「我要在阿仙奴和車路士之間作出選擇，最終我選擇了阿仙奴，因為這裡的足球哲學和穩定性更吸引我。」

「這宗轉會對我意味良多，我總是夢想著能在英超賽場馳騁，而阿仙奴則是一間出色的球會，這裡擁有許多法國球員。我很崇拜阿仙奴，我知道雲加很想我加盟，而我不確定迪馬堤奧是否知道我是誰。」

基奧特加盟後，阿仙奴一隊的前鋒增加至7人，顯然已經過剩，預計雲加會在今夏賣走2到3人。（Goal.com）

Chelsea face the very real possibility of sending Emerson Palmieri back to Roma and scrapping the move for him following a problem which has emerged regarding his heart, according to Sky Sport Italia.

The Blue were due to announce the conclusion of the deal for the stopper on Tuesday, but club medical director PACO BIOSCA has requested a further medical after what should have been his final examination revealed new concerns over the player's heart.

The report suggests Emerson Palmieri will have another medical at Cobham later this afternoon and it is here where a final decision will be made as to whether he joins the club or not.

Club director Marina Granovskaia is expected to be present at the medical and an official announcement is expected to arrive within the next few hours. Emerson's entourage are also in London and they are concerned.

Layvin Kurzawa's agent was set to meet Chelsea today over the defender's future, but that move has slipped following the Emerson drama.

Sky Sport Italia are reporting that a problem with the Italian's heart may see the move fall through...



Chelsea face the very real possibility of sending Emerson Palmieri back to Roma and scrapping the move for him following a problem which has emerged regarding his heart, according to Sky Sport Italia.

The Blue were due to announce the conclusion of the deal for the stopper on Tuesday, but club medical director PACO BIOSCA has requested a further medical after what should have been his final examination revealed new concerns over the player's heart.

The report suggests Emerson Palmieri will have another medical at Cobham later this afternoon and it is here where a final decision will be made as to whether he joins the club or not.

Club director Marina Granovskaia is expected to be present at the medical and an official announcement is expected to arrive within the next few hours. Emerson's entourage are also in London and they are concerned.

Layvin Kurzawa's agent was set to meet Chelsea today over the defender's future, but that move has slipped following the Emerson drama.

The Blue were due to announce the conclusion of the deal for the stopper on Tuesday, but club medical director PACO BIOSCA has requested a further medical after what should have been his final examination revealed new concerns over the player's heart.

The report suggests Emerson Palmieri will have another medical at Cobham later this afternoon and it is here where a final decision will be made as to whether he joins the club or not.

Club director Marina Granovskaia is expected to be present at the medical and an official announcement is expected to arrive within the next few hours. Emerson's entourage are also in London and they are concerned.

Layvin Kurzawa's agent was set to meet Chelsea today over the defender's future, but that move has slipped following the Emerson drama.
